Defines a singleton `LibraryRegistry` and functions to register global functions and class constructors in JerryScript for Mbed OS.


## Files
- **[registry.cpp](registry.cpp.md)**: Defines a singleton instance of the `LibraryRegistry` for JerryScript on Mbed OS.
- **[wrap_tools.cpp](wrap_tools.cpp.md)**: Functions to register global functions and class constructors in JerryScript for mbed OS.
